ddls:
CREATE TABLE "grid_configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grid configuration */,
  "grid_format_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the grid format used */,
  "grid_type" TEXT /* Type of the grid configuration */,
  "gridfile" TEXT /* File path to the input grid file relative to the current directory */,
  "plot3d_cutfile" TEXT /* File path to the input file that specifies the cut conditions for a multiblock Plot3D grid file */,
  "plot3d_bcsfile" TEXT /* File path to the input file that specifies the boundary conditions for a Plot3D grid file */,
  "grid_scaling_factor" REAL /* Multiplication factor to scale the grid coordinates to the desired length units */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the grid configuration */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in this version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the grid configuration was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the grid configuration was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the grid configuration */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the grid configuration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grid_configurations_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grid_configurations_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grid_configurations_grid_format_id FOREIGN KEY ("grid_format_id") REFERENCES grid_formats ("format_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grid_formats" (
  "format_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grid format */,
  "format_name" TEXT /* Name of the grid format */,
  "format_description" TEXT /* Description of the grid format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("format_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grid_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grid file */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the grid configuration the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the grid file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the grid file in MB */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the grid file (e.g., grid, cut, bcs) */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the grid file (e.g., ASCII, binary) */,
  "file_hash" TEXT /* Hash of the grid file content */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grid_files_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES grid_configurations ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, researcher, admin) */,
  "user_role_description" TEXT /* Description of the user's role */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the grid configuration being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the grid configuration */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the grid configuration was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "log_description" TEXT /* Description of the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES grid_configurations ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulation_runs" (
  "run_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each simulation run */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the grid configuration used in the simulation */,
  "run_name" TEXT /* Name of the simulation run */,
  "run_status" TEXT /* Status of the simulation run (e.g., running, completed, failed) */,
  "simulation_status_description" TEXT /* Description of the simulation run status */,
  "simulation_priority" TEXT /* Priority of the simulation run (e.g., high, low) */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the simulation started */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the simulation ended */,
  "results_file" TEXT /* File path to the results file */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the simulation run */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the simulation run was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("run_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_runs_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES grid_configurations ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_runs_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulation_parameters" (
  "param_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each simulation parameter */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation run the parameter belongs to */,
  "param_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter */,
  "param_value" TEXT /* Value of the parameter */,
  "param_type" TEXT /* Type of the parameter (e.g., integer, float, string) */,
  "parameter_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the parameter (e.g., kg, m, s) */,
  "parameter_category" TEXT /* Category of the parameter (e.g., fluid, solid) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("param_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_parameters_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES simulation_runs ("run_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_info" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "project_priority" TEXT /* Priority of the project (e.g., high, low) */,
  "project_status" TEXT /* Status of the project (e.g., ongoing, completed) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the project */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_info_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_configurations" (
  "project_config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project configuration link */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the grid configuration */,
  "configuration_role" TEXT /* Role of the grid configuration in the project (e.g., main, reference) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the link */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the link was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_configurations_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES project_info ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_configurations_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_configurations_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES grid_configurations ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_runs" (
  "project_run_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project simulation run link */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation run */,
  "run_role" TEXT /* Role of the simulation run in the project (e.g., main, reference) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the link */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the link was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_run_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_runs_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES project_info ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_runs_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES simulation_runs ("run_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_runs_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_projects" (
  "user_project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-project link */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "project_role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the project (e.g., lead, member) */,
  "project_role_description" TEXT /* Description of the user's role in the project */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the link was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_projects_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES project_info ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_projects_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project file */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the project file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the file in MB */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file (e.g., report, data) */,
  "file_category" TEXT /* Category of the file (e.g., reports, images, data) */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_files_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES project_info ("project_id")
)
